headline: Autodesk’s Rhumbix Deal Links Jobsite Data To Undervalued Stock Story
summary: Autodesk (NasdaqGS:ADSK) has agreed to acquire Rhumbix, a construction jobsite data and project controls platform. The deal is intended to bring real-time jobsite data, payroll, and reporting into Autodesk's broader construction software suite. Rhumbix focuses on timekeeping, field data capture, and project controls across the construction project lifecycle. For Autodesk, best known for its design and engineering software, construction has become an important focus area as clients look to...
